originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Reviewing Bet's Blaster Refactor and Setting Up Breakout Hyperparameter Sweeps
summary: Reviewed Bet's Blaster code refactor, removing prototypes and fixing asset map indexing. Set up a CARBS hyperparameter sweep for breakout to optimize training wall-clock time, including adding a num_minibatches parameter. Discussed Neptune dashboard features for experiment tracking.
